emails.subject: Sempra
emails.body: Sempra sent back K# 27342 (30,000/d Ignacio to Blanco) and had added a footnote about alternate points at Max Rate inside and outside the path (which I forwarded to you). This has not been activated as I'm waiting for you to approve/disapprove their change. Craig

emails.subject: RE: Sempra
emails.body: RE: Sempra Craig, Sempra discussed this with Michelle Lokay and she indicated that it was OK. We will initial the revised contract and deliver to you today. Thanks, Paul To: Y'Barbo, Paul; Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: Sempra
emails.body: Michelle just called and said it wasn't okay; they can only have alternate's inside the path at Max Rate. She thinks they're going to re-send...
